mapper.select: SELECT * FROM blog_post_published WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT p.*, u.display_name AS author_name, au.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM blog_post_published p JOIN users u ON p.author_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON p.approved_by = au.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_post_published ( author_id, title, slug, content, category, is_public, approved_at, approved_by, published_at, last_updated_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{title}, #{slug}, #{content}, #{category}, true, #{approvedAt}, #{approvedById}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_post_published SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, approved_by = #{approvedById}, last_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE blog_post_published SET is_public = false, last_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE blog_post_published SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM blog_post_published WHERE slug = #{slug} AND is_deleted = false)
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) FROM blog_post_histories WHERE post_id = #{postId}
